4. Scope matters handled by Sarah Vance.
Relation: unrelated. Both can be true. One is about the port, the other is about scope management.

So all of them are "unrelated".

New claim: "The development server for the Meridian project runs on port 3000."
Old 1: TypeScript stack. -> unrelated
Old 2: Client is Halcyon. -> unrelated
Old 3: Project named Meridian. -> unrelated
Old 4: Scope handled by Sarah Vance. -> unrelated

All are unrelated because they are about different aspects of the Meridian project (tech stack, client, name, scope contact) and do not contradict or refine the new claim about the dev server port.
